ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the food item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the food item */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the price */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the food item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the price was collected */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the food item in the city */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the price was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the price has been verified */,
  "verification_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the verification process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES food_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was collected */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the food item on the specified date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical price data */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the historical price has been verified */,
  "verification_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the verification process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id")
)
